_comment: Informational pin of the current minted GitHub release, for the NixOS module's manually-downloaded serverArchive path to verify against (warns, doesn't fail, on a mismatch -- custom/local bundles are supported). Regenerated by scripts/update_nix_release.py at every release cut (see HANDOFF.md's release pipeline) -- do not hand-edit except for emergencies, and re-run the script afterward to confirm the hash still matches.
